title: Brutal Respawn
description: You can no longer reset your hunger level or restore your health by respawning. You will respawn with 1 health point and a hunger level based on your pre-death level.
body:
The purpose of this mod is to prevent players from abusing the respawn mechanic to reset hunger and health. Now, players revive with 1 HP and their previous hunger level (starting from version 1.1, a 3-point penalty is applied).
To prevent immediate starvation upon respawning (especially if you die with 0 hunger), a 10-minute “Brutally Respawned” effect is added.

This mod is fully customizable via [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) — you can adjust health, hunger points, or effect duration. However, I recommend playing with the default settings first to truly experience the mod's vision.

Let it be brutal.
